priceLines: I confirm that I have read and agree to the Terms of Use, Billing Terms and Money-back Policy, Start your 3-day trial for $0.99 and get immediate access to the app. After the trial, you agree to be charged $39.99 every month starting from July 22, 2026 until canceled. By starting, you waive the 14-day withdrawal right as the service is fully provided. No refunds for partial periods. By completing your purchase, you consent to us securely storing your payment details for future charges. You can cancel anytime via account settings or by contacting support at support@iqtrains.com
